changes: Added typed ApiClientError kinds for http, timeout, network, malformed, cancelled, and unknown failures.
Added friendly display messages while preserving URL/status diagnostics.
Added malformed JSON and non-JSON response handling.

friendly_layer_errors.behavior: Layer and Methodology model-status failures now use classified, user-readable API error messages.

error_boundaries.behavior: Render failures are contained to a local module recovery card instead of blanking the entire app.

selected_parcel_optimization.behavior: Repeated selection of the already-selected parcel preserves hydrated parcel intelligence instead of clearing and refetching it.

layer_guardrail.behavior: Default layer IDs now honor layer visibility controllability so disabled/internal placeholders cannot become default-active later.

checks: development model aggregate endpoint and prediction safety flags

python_pytest.note: Initial pytest run found an unrelated UTF-8 BOM in outputs/phase13c_transportation_enhanced_model_comparison_summary.json. The BOM was removed without changing JSON content; full suite then passed.

browser_smoke.note: In-app browser render check passed. A follow-up automation click on the very narrow Methodology nav button did not switch modes, but TopNav handler wiring was verified in code and no browser console errors were reported.

runtime_artifacts.commit_guidance: Do not commit runtime logs. They were generated by npm run dev:cfs and left uncommitted.

remaining_limitations: No frontend unit test runner is configured in package.json; frontend safety was validated by typecheck, lint, build, and browser render smoke.
Development prediction remains internal aggregate research only.
School capacity scoring remains inactive until verified official capacity/enrollment data is ingested.
Some Phase 14A data request artifacts were already uncommitted before this task and were preserved.
recommended_next_step: Perform a clean commit that includes Phase 15A source/docs/summary changes while excluding runtime logs and unrelated generated last-run artifacts.
